summary: Content added to the document after publication, kept visible as a tracked change.
use: For corrections and additions to published content, stamped with datetime and a cite URL pointing at what prompted the change.
avoid: Not for underlining (CSS) and not for content that was simply always there.
attributes: datetime — when the edit was made

summary: Content removed from the document after publication, kept visible as a tracked change.
use: Paired with ins for corrections where the record of what changed matters — changelogs, meeting minutes, errata.
avoid: For content that is merely no longer accurate (an old price) but wasn't an 'edit', use s instead.
attributes: datetime — when the edit was made
